hii team,
this is yaswanth,
today updates are,
- Added the kitchen camera view when any user comes in that area and using the phone more than 10 seconds it automatically send the photo and snapshot to the given number
- Disabled Pose-Only Heuristics: Removed the skeletal hand-to-ear and texting posture checks from rules.py to stop false alerts when people rest their heads or type.
- Removed Nearest-Employee Fallback: Eliminated the rule that assigned a phone to the nearest person, preventing workers on the left from being flagged for phone use on the right.
- Tightened Overlap Boundary: Reduced the spatial boundary from $20%$ to a tight $10%$, ensuring a phone is only matched when it is touching or directly next to the person.
- Optimized Frame Rate Efficiency: Verified that the system runs YOLO directly on the whole image (instead of SAHI slicing) to keep CPU frame processing as fast as possible.
- Rebuilt the AI Container: Compiled and restarted the ai_engine Docker container to ensure all phone detection logic updates went live.
- Validated Real-Time Tracking: Monitored the terminal logs to confirm that all staff are successfully tracked without generating any false alerts.
